Class WbemcliFFM

java.lang.Object
oshi.ffm.windows.com.WbemcliFFM
public final class WbemcliFFM extends Object
Constants for WMI (Windows Management Instrumentation) via WbemCli.

These include CIM data types, WBEM flags, and error codes.
